name: Prompts Catalog
description: Curated prompt collections, libraries, and marketplaces for AI coding agents

sources.name: f/prompts.chat
sources.description: World's largest open-source prompt library. Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral.

sources.name: x1xhlol/system-prompts
sources.description: System prompts extracted from 50+ AI products (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Cursor, Devin, v0, Replit).

sources.name: danielmiessler/Fabric
sources.description: 200+ Patterns organized by real-world task. Chain-of-thought, tree-of-thought, and 8 reasoning strategies.

sources.name: anthropics/prompt-eng-interactive-tutorial
sources.description: Official Anthropic Jupyter notebook course covering all prompt engineering fundamentals.

sources.name: langgptai/LangGPT
sources.description: Structured prompt engineering framework with collections for Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Qwen, Llama.

sources.name: ai-boost/awesome-prompts
sources.description: Curated list of ChatGPT prompts for various use cases.

sources.name: dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide
sources.description: Academic prompt engineering guide with theory and practice.

sources.name: openai/openai-cookbook
sources.description: Official OpenAI cookbook with examples and guides.

sources.name: anthropic/prompt-library
sources.description: Official Claude prompt library with categorized prompts.

sources.name: YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-gpt-image-2
sources.description: Definitive GPT Image 2 collection with web gallery, 16 languages.

sources.name: repowise-dev/claude-code-prompts
sources.description: Deep analysis of Claude Code's architecture: system prompt, 11 tool prompts, 5 agent prompts, 9 pattern analyses.

sources.name: florian101010/awesome-agentic-AI-coding-template
sources.description: Multi-agent template pre-wired for Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, Jules, Gemini.

sources.name: patricio0312rev/agentkit
sources.description: CLI tool scaffolding 42 pre-built agents across 7 departments.
